long_description:
[COM] Kube apiserver below threshold is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/deployment-pods-not-running.html 
TIP Situation: Insufficient number of kube-apiservers running
TIP Short Description: N/A in mzone2e7 is having insufficient servers 
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2e7:pod:N/A

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_status_ready{condition="true",kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*",kube_namespace_name="kube-system", kube_pod_name=~"kube-apiserver.*"} == 1) < 5 = 2
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2e7'

Time:             12/09/2025 04:18 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/0ec21ec2-7b10-4e13-b1ee-56b3ae8e8f71?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38622925%2Fdetails

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] Kube apiserver below threshold
Description:  Kube apiserver count is below threshold for the last 15mins

Scope:
    Everywhere
